title: GDP, current US$
description: Gross domestic product by country in current US dollars. Useful for comparing economic size across countries and over time.
text_for_embedding:
GDP, current US$
Gross domestic product by country in current US dollars. Useful for comparing economic size across countries and over time.
source: World Bank
geography: world, countries
time period: 1960-2025
frequency: annual
indicators: GDP NY.GDP.MKTP.CD current US$
dimensions: country, year
tags: gdp, ввп, economy, world bank, countries

title: GDP growth, annual %
description: Annual percentage growth rate of GDP at market prices based on constant local currency.
text_for_embedding:
GDP growth, annual %
Annual percentage growth rate of GDP at market prices based on constant local currency.
source: World Bank
geography: world, countries
time period: 1961-2025
frequency: annual
indicators: GDP growth NY.GDP.MKTP.KD.ZG annual %
dimensions: country, year
tags: gdp, growth, ввп, рост экономики, world bank

title: Real disposable income index of Russian population
description: Real disposable monetary income of the population in Russia. Useful for welfare dynamics and inflation-adjusted income analysis.

Real disposable income index of Russian population
Real disposable monetary income of the population in Russia. Useful for welfare dynamics and inflation-adjusted income analysis.

time period: 1995-2025
frequency: annual, quarterly
indicators: Real disposable income index rosstat_real_income_index index or % to previous period
dimensions: year, quarter
tags: income, real income, доходы, реальные доходы, росстат, inflation adjusted
